The gamma rays were measured with a large
anti-Compton NaI(Tl) spectrometer using TOF. The main
detector of spectrometer (15.2 cm dia.,30.5 cm length),
was within a hollow Compton-suppression detector
The spectrometer was shielded with borated paraffin,
For the 15-100 keV range, a small 6Li-glass
detector (5.0 mm diameter, 5.0 mm thick) was placed
30 cm away from the 7Li neutron-generation target.
For the 550 keV measurements, a larger 6Li-glass
detector (102 mm diameter, 6.4 mm thick) was positioned
455 cm away from the neutron source.

A pulse-height weighting technique was used on
the observed gamma-ray spectra to determine capture
